/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CONTD BW CONTEMPTDISPO/NP/X: PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5 TODAY/CTORD:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGED/SAWD/NB/X: NO BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT CONTEMPT DISPOSITION & TO SET/DOPC/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: NO BURGLARY TOOLS/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASEFROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: DO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL, AND NOT POSSESS BURGLARY TOOLS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD  PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/X: TO REPORT TO ACM 3 TIMES BY PHONE/X: TO SET PRCS CHANGED FROM 06-14-22 TO 07-06-22/
/CAL: CONTEMPT DISPOSTION AND TO SET/BWDNC/OR/CONTD: CUSTODY STATUS ANDPRE HEARING CONFERNCE/DOP/TE: 30MIN/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:30MI
/CAL: TO SET APD 3455/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:25000/X: NO CITE/X: 1 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:TO SET APD 3455 (PRCS)/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS SICK/X:DA IS APPEARING VIAZOOM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET PC3455/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25000/X: NO CITE/BWNUM:1ST/X: 1OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:TO SET APD PC 3455 MOTION AND TOJ OIN #22000066/X:THE PEOPLE APPEAREDVIA ZOOM,/OR/CONTD:TO SET 3455PC/DOP/
/CAL:BAIL MOTION/MO DENIED/TBH:22000066/X:DEFENDANT ARRAIGNED ON APD PC3455 PRCS/WIAMTR/CONTD:TRAILING/DOP/
